title: Poors Mc Story-Mode+
description: A mod that tries to replicate minecraft story mode
body: Minecraft mod pack, which adds aspects from Minecraft Story Mode to your world! see the  world eater, the Witherstorm which will put your bravery and ability to the top. Arm yourself with the special Story Mode armor and battle against mobs. This modpack turns your gameplay into an fun and (probally) nostigic experince get your friends to play for a extra fun experience
